title: Bibliopraphic records of matched Philpapers papers in the 17 topics
author: Pei-Shan Chi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The matched papers of 17 topic in Philpapers, with its original bibliographical records and WoS UT number. The matched progress can be referred in the paper "Measuring the Isolation of Research Topics in Philosophy" by Pei-Shan Chi and Stijn Conix.   

 Chi, P.S. & Conix, S. (under review). Measuring the Isolation of Research Topics in Philosophy, Scientometrics.
steps_raw:

keywords: Philpapers; Web of Science, Philosophy isolation
